# Tinybox SDK

> Agent Content Tree for Tinybox SDK.

## Reference

- [Create a bucket](https://example.com/api/buckets/create/): Provision a new storage bucket in the workspace.
- [Delete a bucket](https://example.com/api/buckets/delete/): Remove an empty bucket from the workspace.
- [Get a bucket](https://example.com/api/buckets/get/): Fetch a single bucket descriptor by name.
- [List buckets](https://example.com/api/buckets/list/): List all buckets visible to the calling principal.
- [Delete an object](https://example.com/api/objects/delete/): Remove an object key from a bucket.
- [Download an object](https://example.com/api/objects/download/): Fetch an object payload, optionally honoring a version selector.
- [List objects](https://example.com/api/objects/list/): Enumerate objects in a bucket with optional prefix filtering.
- [Upload an object](https://example.com/api/objects/upload/): Stream a payload into a bucket under a chosen key.
- [Delete a webhook](https://example.com/api/webhooks/delete/): Remove a webhook subscription by id.
- [List webhooks](https://example.com/api/webhooks/list/): Enumerate webhook subscriptions for the current project.
- [Register a webhook](https://example.com/api/webhooks/register/): Subscribe a callback URL to bucket or object lifecycle events.
- [Changelog](https://example.com/changelog/): Release notes for the Tinybox SDK reference docs.
- [Bucket lifecycle policy reference](https://example.com/recipes/lifecycle-policy/): Lifecycle rules table for retention configuration.

## Documentation

- [Authentication](https://example.com/concepts/auth/): Bearer-token authentication and per-project scoping.
- [Data model](https://example.com/concepts/data-model/): Buckets, Objects, and Webhooks: the three top-level resources.
- [Buckets concept](https://example.com/concepts/storage/buckets/): Buckets are regional containers that hold objects.
- [Lifecycle policies](https://example.com/concepts/storage/lifecycle/): Automatic transitions between storage classes by age or tag.
- [Objects concept](https://example.com/concepts/storage/objects/): Objects are immutable byte sequences keyed within a bucket.
- [Your first project](https://example.com/getting-started/first-project/): Walk through wiring a real application against Tinybox storage.
- [Install the SDK](https://example.com/getting-started/install/): Install the Tinybox SDK via the package manager of your choice.
- [Quickstart](https://example.com/getting-started/quickstart/): Provision a bucket and upload your first object in under a minute.
- [Tinybox SDK overview](https://example.com/intro/): Introduction to the Tinybox storage SDK: data model, capabilities, and a tour of the docs.

- [Unexpected size difference symptom (Objects)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/objects/unexpected-size-difference-symptom/): Resolve "unexpected size difference" — symptom for the Objects surface.
- [Upload checksum mismatch reproduction (Objects)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/objects/upload-checksum-mismatch-reproduction/): Resolve "upload checksum mismatch" — reproduction for the Objects surface.
- [Upload checksum mismatch resolution (Objects)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/objects/upload-checksum-mismatch-resolution/): Resolve "upload checksum mismatch" — resolution for the Objects surface.
- [Upload checksum mismatch symptom (Objects)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/objects/upload-checksum-mismatch-symptom/): Resolve "upload checksum mismatch" — symptom for the Objects surface.
- [Callback host unreachable reproduction (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-host-unreachable-reproduction/): Resolve "callback host unreachable" — reproduction for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback host unreachable resolution (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-host-unreachable-resolution/): Resolve "callback host unreachable" — resolution for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback host unreachable symptom (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-host-unreachable-symptom/): Resolve "callback host unreachable" — symptom for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback not received reproduction (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-not-received-reproduction/): Resolve "callback not received" — reproduction for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback not received resolution (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-not-received-resolution/): Resolve "callback not received" — resolution for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback not received symptom (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-not-received-symptom/): Resolve "callback not received" — symptom for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback times out reproduction (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-times-out-reproduction/): Resolve "callback times out" — reproduction for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback times out resolution (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-times-out-resolution/): Resolve "callback times out" — resolution for the Webhooks surface.
- [Callback times out symptom (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/callback-times-out-symptom/): Resolve "callback times out" — symptom for the Webhooks surface.
- [Duplicate deliveries reproduction (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/duplicate-deliveries-reproduction/): Resolve "duplicate deliveries" — reproduction for the Webhooks surface.
- [Duplicate deliveries resolution (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/duplicate-deliveries-resolution/): Resolve "duplicate deliveries" — resolution for the Webhooks surface.
- [Duplicate deliveries symptom (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/duplicate-deliveries-symptom/): Resolve "duplicate deliveries" — symptom for the Webhooks surface.
- [Event filter not applied reproduction (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/event-filter-not-applied-reproduction/): Resolve "event filter not applied" — reproduction for the Webhooks surface.
- [Event filter not applied resolution (Webhooks)](https://example.com/troubleshooting/webhooks/event-filter-not-applied-resolution/): Resolve "event filter not applied" — resolution for the Webhooks surface.
